nasb.text: They will build houses and inhabit them; They will also plant vineyards and eat their fruit.

esv.text: They shall build houses and inhabit them; they shall plant vineyards and eat their fruit.

cnv.text: 他們必建造房屋，住在其中； 他們必栽種葡萄園，吃其中的果子。

ccb.text: 他们要建造房屋，安然居住， 栽种葡萄园，吃园中的果子。

csbs.text: 他们必建造房屋，居住其中； 栽种葡萄园，享用其中的果实。
